$comment: Machine-readable surface for /apply-pattern. Human spec: patterns/entitlement-overlay/pattern.md. Expressed AS an invariant cluster (see docs/patterns-registry.md#patterns-as-clusters-of-invariants). Promoted from candidate; realized in dogeared-coach admin comps.
title: Floor-Raising Entitlement Overlay (admin comps)
applies_when: a plan-tiered SaaS where support/sales must grant an account MORE than its tier pays for
the grant must NOT mutate the billing subscription (comped-and-still-billing is normal)
you need bespoke per-field limits a billing-vendor coupon can't express
components: overlay-stored-orthogonally: raw payer tier persisted separately from effective; overlay_plan + per-field overlay_limits + reason/granted_by/at
floor-raising-max: EffectiveLimits computes each cap as max(base, overlay); overlay can only raise, never lower
unlimited-beats-finite: the -1 unlimited sentinel must compare greater than any finite value in BOTH directions (maxCap), or a naive max silently lowers an unlimited plan
grant-only-writer: only upward grants (paid tiers, non-negative caps), reason required, audited, blocked from impersonated/suspended sessions
reconcile-preserves-comp: billing reconcile writes effective = max(payer, overlay) every webhook, so a routine sync can't revert a comp (no comp-immunity flag needed)
single-effective-seam: every gate/quota reads EffectiveLimits(account), never the raw payer tier

invariants.$comment: The cluster this pattern guarantees; grounded in dogeared-coach admin comps (services/plan.go + billing_reconcile.go + admin_provider.go).

cluster.statement: Floor-raising: effective(field) = max(base, overlay) per field; overlay only ever raises.
Grant-only writer: only upward grants (paid tiers, reason required, audited), blocked from impersonated/suspended sessions.
Unlimited (-1 sentinel) beats finite in BOTH directions, or a naive max silently lowers an unlimited plan.
Orthogonal source of truth: payer tier persisted separately; reconcile recomputes max(payer, overlay) so a comp is never reverted.
Single enforcement seam reads EFFECTIVE limits, not the raw payer tier.

payer_tier_field.description: Where the raw billed tier is persisted, distinct from effective.

overlay_fields.description: Per-field caps the overlay can raise.

unlimited_sentinel.description: Value that must compare as greater than any finite cap.

grant_authority.description: Who may grant; writer blocked from impersonated/suspended sessions.

enforcement_seam.description: The single function all gates call for effective limits.

metrics.desc: comps silently dropped by a billing sync (target 0; INV-EO-004)
an overlay that lowered a payer's cap (target 0; -1-beats-finite guard)
overlay grants with no reason/audit row (target 0)

depends_on.tiered-subscription: the overlay raises the floor above the plan matrix; effective seam is its enforcement seam reading max(payer, overlay)
depends_on.fetch-on-webhook-reconcile: the reconcile recomputes max so a webhook can't revert a comp

feeds.improvement-loop: comp grants are trusted operator signal; entitlement is a protected path so loop changes are admin-gated
